breakdown: This PR adds a RewardsBox TypedDict and validate_rewards_box() function in custom_types.py to enforce schema validation on rewards_box data structures. The validation properly checks for required fields, field types (bool, int, list), and rejects unknown fields. Tests are comprehensive and well-structured. Minor deduction for error handling as validation returns boolean rather than raising typed exceptions, and naming gets slight deduction due to truncated diff limiting full context visibility.
key_changes: Added RewardsBox TypedDict with required fields (level_up_available, xp_gained, current_xp, next_level_xp, gold, loot, source)
Added validate_rewards_box() function with schema enforcement logic
Added validation for progress_percent field with type checking (rejects bool/int/float only)
Created test_rewards_box_schema.py with comprehensive TDD tests covering validation scenarios
Updated narrative_response schema validation to check source_id is string when not None
